name: agentic-command
description: Electron wrapper for terminal-based agentic AI tools

scripts.postinstall: npm run prepare:renderer-assets && npm run prepare:preload-ipc-contract
scripts.check: npm run prepare:renderer-assets && npm run prepare:preload-ipc-contract && npm run check:renderer-assets && npm run check:preload-ipc-contract && node --check scripts/sync-renderer-assets.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-preload-ipc-contract.mjs && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/main/ipc/registerIpcHandlers.js && node --check src/main/ipc/registerAppIpcHandlers.js && node --check src/main/ipc/registerSessionIpcHandlers.js && node --check src/main/ipc/registerWorkspaceIpcHandlers.js && node --check src/main/ipc/registerManualTerminalIpcHandlers.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js && node --check src/renderer/terminalRuntime.js && node --check src/renderer/workspaceTools.js
